A.justification: Executes autonomously within hard policy limits (refund cap); human reviews asynchronously — §13.3 anchor 3.

T.justification: State-changing tools act on production customer-facing state (refunds, outbound replies) — §13.3 anchor 3.

D.justification: Ordinary personal data including possible minors' accounts and support history — §13.3 anchor 3.

E.justification: One-to-one outbound communications to external customers (email, ticket replies) — §13.3 anchor 2.

R.justification: Refunds and mass replies reversible only with significant effort and cost — §13.3 anchor 2.

mitigations.evidence: Per-task scoped credentials from a deny-by-default tool registry; no standing write credentials held.
Immutable action log capturing actor, inputs, outputs, timestamps, trace id for every tool call (§18.5).
Refund value cap and rate limits enforced outside the model; documented and tested kill-switch runbook.
PII redaction in model context assembly; customer-memory retention limited with automated purge.
Users informed they are interacting with an AI agent; generated content labeled per jurisdictional rules.

A.justification: Autonomous containment within hard policy limits; human review within 30 minutes after action — §13.3 anchor 3.

T.justification: High-potency tools: security controls at fleet scale (isolate VMs, revoke credentials) — §13.3 anchor 4.

D.justification: Telemetry and infrastructure data; minimal personal data in the operating flow — §13.3 anchor 1.

E.justification: Outputs visible to internal operators; customer-visible effects but no external comms — §13.3 anchor 1.

R.justification: Wrong quarantine causes costly outages; mostly recoverable but practically severe — §13.3 anchor 3.

mitigations.evidence: Per-task scoped credentials; deny-by-default tool registry for every containment action taken.
Immutable action log of every containment step with trace ids and before/after state digests.
Blast-radius limiter capping hosts per window; kill-switch tested in quarterly game-day drills.
Prompt-injection testing program; untrusted alert content isolated from tool-invocation context.
Documented pre-deployment review by the platform security team outside the building team.
Incident response runbook with tested rollback and customer notification procedure in place.

A.justification: Content auto-published within an approved moderation plan; batch-level human oversight — §13.3 anchor 2.

T.justification: Read-only tools plus posting to the game's own feed; no high-potency state changes — §13.3 anchor 1.

D.justification: Minors' data plus deep cross-session profiling of player relationships — §13.3 anchor 3.

E.justification: Public-facing content posted to the community feed at scale — §13.3 anchor 3.

R.justification: Public synthetic content spreads; minors' exposure is not undoable once published — §13.3 anchor 3.

mitigations.evidence: Immutable log of every generation and post action with trace ids and content digests kept.
PII filtering before model context; age-gating enforced; memory retention limits with purge API.
AI companion disclosed in-product; all generated media labeled as synthetic per local rules.
